user.title: LD1125H Matter Radar
user.description:
Enter the Matter node ID and occupancy-sensor endpoint ID.
Find the node ID in Settings > Devices & Services > Matter.

error.matter_not_ready: Matter integration is not loaded yet.
error.node_not_found: No Matter node with that ID was found.
error.endpoint_not_found: That endpoint does not exist on the node.
